one_liner: Canada's largest passive oil and gas royalty company: perpetual fee-simple mineral title, zero operating capex, dividend-backed cash yield with undeveloped acreage optionality.
key_assumptions: FY2025 funds from operations C$1.50/sh anchors owner-cash base (not Q1 2026 C$0.41/qtr peak)
4% per-share FFO growth years 1-5; exit 18x owner cash in year 10
Undeveloped fee-land option explicit zero in Lawrence base; E&E risk-adjusted in component schedule
Net debt C$257.7M (0.6x EBITDA); sustainable dividend C$1.06/sh
open_questions: Full reserve-life PV bridge vs distribution capitalization multiple
WCS differential and AECO gas volatility on realized $/BOE
PFIC/US tax friction for cross-border holders
